input.content:
Subject: Welcome to [Platform Name]! 🎉 Get Started in Minutes

---

Hi [Customer Name],

Welcome to [Platform Name]! We're thrilled to have you join our community of thousands of successful users.

Your account is now active and ready to use. Whether you're looking to [primary benefit], [secondary benefit], or [tertiary benefit], we're here to help you succeed.

GETTING STARTED

To make the most of [Platform Name], we recommend:

1. Complete Your Profile
   Set up your profile information and preferences in Account Settings. This helps us personalize your experience.
   [Link: Account Settings]

2. Explore Your Dashboard
   Get familiar with your dashboard to see key metrics and manage your workflow.
   [Link: Go to Dashboard]

3. Check Out Our Documentation
   We've created comprehensive guides to help you get up and running quickly.
   [Link: Knowledge Base]

4. Watch Our Quick-Start Video
   See a 5-minute overview of the core features that will help you get started.
   [Link: Quick-Start Video]

SPECIAL OFFER FOR NEW USERS

As a welcome gift, we're offering [offer details, e.g., "30 days of extended trial access" or "20% off your first month"]. No credit card required to redeem!

[Link: Claim Your Welcome Offer]

NEED HELP?

If you have any questions or run into any issues, our support team is here to help:

• Email: support@[domain].com
• Live Chat: Available in-app during business hours
• Community Forum: Connect with other users and share tips
  [Link: Community Forum]

WHAT'S NEXT?

In the coming days, we'll be sending you helpful tips and tutorials to maximize your success with [Platform Name]. You can customize which communications you'd like to receive in your notification preferences.

Thank you for choosing [Platform Name]. We can't wait to see what you'll accomplish!

Best regards,

[Your Name]
[Your Title]
[Platform Name] Team

P.S. We'd love to hear your feedback! If you have a few minutes, take our quick onboarding survey to help us improve your experience.
[Link: Feedback Survey]

---

[Footer]
[Platform Name] | [Website URL]
[Address]
[Contact Information]

To manage your email preferences, [click here]
To unsubscribe, [click here]

final_response:
Perfect! I've created a comprehensive customer welcome email template for your SaaS platform. The template includes:

**Key Sections:**
- **Warm greeting** - Sets a friendly, welcoming tone
- **Getting Started guide** - 4 essential steps with action links to help users onboard quickly
- **Special offer** - A placeholder for exclusive welcome incentives
- **Support resources** - Multiple ways users can get help (email, chat, forum)
- **Next steps communication** - Sets expectations for future ema
